zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Molyneux於大約1310年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蕾托 哥羅士比時，她的父親Sir William de Molyneux48歲，母親Isabella de Scarisbrick45歲。她和jr Robert "Erneis"  De Erneis jr至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1389年在英國英格蘭素斯 越可爾曼諾享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Molyneux于大约1310年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾蕾托 哥羅士比时，她的父亲Sir William de Molyneux48岁，母亲Isabella de Scarisbrick45岁。她和jr Robert "Erneis"  De Erneis jr至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1389年在英国英格兰素斯 越可爾曼諾享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Molyneux was born about 1310, in Little Crosby, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William de Molyneux, was 48 and her mother, Isabella de Scarisbrick, was 45. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with jr Robert "Erneis"  De Erneis jr. She died in 1389, in Manor, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Molyneux est née environ 1310, à Little Crosby, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Molyneux, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Scarisbrick, avait 45 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec jr Robert "Erneis"  De Erneis jr. Elle est décédée en 1389, à Manor, South Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Molyneux um 1310 in Little Crosby, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Molyneux 48 und ihre Mutter Isabella de Scarisbrick 45. Sie hatte mit jr Robert "Erneis"  De Erneis jr mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1389 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Manor, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Molyneux è nata il circa 1310 nel Little Crosby, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William de Molyneux, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Isabella de Scarisbrick, aveva 45 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con jr Robert "Erneis"  De Erneis jr. Morì nel 1389, nel Manor, South Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Molyneuxが約1310年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアリットル クロスビーで生まれた時，父Sir William de Molyneuxは48歳，母Isabella de Scarisbrickは45歳であった。彼女はjr Robert "Erneis"  De Erneis jrとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1389年にイギリスイギリスソウス ヨークシュアイアマノーで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Molyneux(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리틀 크로스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Molyneux(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de Scarisbrick(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 jr Robert "Erneis"  De Erneis jr(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 소우스 요르크실르 먼어에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Molyneux родилась около 1310 г. в местности литл кросби, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William de Molyneux было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Scarisbrick, 45. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от jr Robert "Erneis"  De Erneis jr. Она умерла в 1389 г. в местности манор, соут еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.
